evidence: "I suspect if I watched it now it would be very dated."
"The story line, as I see it, has little substance."
"I had to fast forward the sex scenes, adults can imagine, they don't need to see nude bodies."
"I liked the characters, acting was good, and storyline such that we watched each episode almost one after the other."
"I dislike it! It seems like a cheaper production."
"Swearing was an exception rather than the rule, unlike so many 'military' shows, which I really commend them on."
"More of this type of entertainment please."
"How I wish society was as moral, polite, restrained and gentle today."
"Excellent show, disappointed they cut production so soon."
"Love this show. Never had it in the UK so catching it now."
"I could watch again, may even buy."

summary: The user has a strong preference for family-friendly and wholesome entertainment, often expressing disappointment with content that includes explicit language or themes. They favor simple narratives and slower pacing, valuing emotional resonance over production quality.
